description: Style NoteCrafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet from bulchee is a must-have accessory for the style conscious male. Bulchee has transformed this traditional accessory by combining classic techniques and innovative designs along with durability. Carry your monetary essentials in style with this classic wallet.Dimensions: 11 cm x 9 cmGuarantee: 6 monthsProduct DescriptionsBrown leather wallet with paneled front with metal brandingHas two main compartments with textile liningFour credit card slots on the left with a slip pocketCoin pocket and one slip pocket on the other side with branding embossed on the pocketCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
